ingredients_text: Vegetable Gyoza (86%) (Wheat Flour, Cabbage, Carrot, Cottonseed Oil, Peas, Onion, Water, Radish, Tapioca Starch, Shiitake Mushrooms, Sugar, Spring Onions, Cornflour, Garlic Purée, Sesame Oil, Salt, White Pepper), Soy And Ginger Dip (14%) (High Maltose Syrup (Contains Sulphites), Water, Sugar, Soya Beans, Salt, Wheat Flour, Rice Vinegar, Ground Ginger, Sesame Oil, Thickener: Sodium Carboxy Methyl Cellulose).
